response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and systems, with notable strengths in distributed systems, cloud architecture, and mentorship. However, his background in C++ (10+ years) is strong but lacks recent large-scale infrastructure or compute platform leadership. His experience in cloud architecture is limited to AWS CDK and Kubernetes, with no explicit mention of compute platform leadership or technical mentoring in cloud/DevOps roles.
strengths: 10+ years of C++ experience, meeting the minimum requirement
Demonstrated ability to lead open-source projects (GISCollective) and mentor teams (Selenium course, Refactoring Dojos)
Experience with distributed systems, cloud technologies (Kubernetes, AWS), and large-scale infrastructure
concerns: Limited direct experience in cloud compute platform leadership or technical mentoring for cloud/DevOps engineers (preferred qualification)
No explicit mention of ownership of large, ambiguous technical projects in a leadership capacity
Recent roles focus heavily on AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, with less emphasis on compute platform strategy
